target: Sprint 0 Track B — 6 component logic bugs
lesson: next-intl usePathname strips locale prefix — always use useLocale() for locale detection, not pathname.startsWith. CSS custom properties (--header-height) are the cleanest way to share dynamic layout values between parent and fixed-position children. Framer Motion: MotionValue-driven style props must not be duplicated in animate prop — causes conflicting animation drivers.
thankYou key already existed in messages for order confirmation — used subscribeThankYou as distinct key to avoid collision
hero-cinematic framer-motion import was already clean (useMotionValueEvent not present); motion-reduce:!h-auto important modifier works in Tailwind v4 to override inline styles
workspace.ae redesign: white bg, #0c0c0c CTAs, Raleway+Montserrat fonts, dense 4-col product grid, 715px hero with 140px top padding
workspace.ae pattern: white bg, inline search, black/dark text, drawer from end-0, cart badge always visible, no gold, no backdrop-blur, fixed 80px height

target: header, hero-banner, footer, homepage — workspace.ae parity
lesson: Three-row header totals ~156px; update layout pt- to match. Footer moved to server component with getTranslations+getLocale. Hero split layout uses logical end-0 for RTL compatibility.

GSAP intro timeline + Framer Motion scroll parallax coexist cleanly; AnimatePresence requires client boundary wrapper when layout is server component; StaggerGrid expects ReactNode[] so items must be pre-mapped arrays in server components
Extract inline card JSX in the same pass as the import — unused import lint hint fires immediately otherwise
Reveal component has no delay prop — use yIn offset for stagger effect. StaggerGrid expects React.ReactNode[] array not JSX fragment.
StaggerGrid children prop is ReactNode[] — pass columns as array literal when using in Server Components

target: about, contact, faq, showrooms, brands, projects
privacy, terms, delivery, track-order, warranty, product-care

lesson: Hero bg switch: bg-[#0c0c0c] text-white -> bg-[#fafafa] border-b border-[rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]; breadcrumb text-white/50 -> text-[#484848]; hover text-white/80 -> text-[#0c0c0c]; subtitle text-white/60 -> text-[#484848]
Confirmation step hides the order summary sidebar — full-width centered layout feels cleaner for post-order state
promo-banner uses props so no file edit needed; stats section structure must match array map shape when changing stat count
font-alyamama is a CSS variable applied via html[lang=ar] selector in globals.css, not a Tailwind utility class

target: cart, checkout, track-order, privacy, terms, delivery, product-care, warranty pages + sitemap + canonical fix
lesson: generateMetadata cannot be used in client components. Extract client logic to a separate component file and keep page.tsx as a server component.
AR v2 scratchpad uses more precise technical vocabulary than task brief summary — always read the full AR file, not just the brief

City SEO pages follow same pattern: PageWrapper + Reveal + SpaceTypology reuse + locale-aware stats array. Dammam/Khobar stats are label-only (no numeric values) so used label as primary text without separate value display.
StaggerGrid had a broken scroll-linked pattern; whileInView variants are simpler and fire once. Always rewrite whole file when multiple stale import refs remain after partial edits.
Supabase Management API rejects service role JWT — only accepts personal access tokens. DDL must be run via Supabase dashboard SQL editor or pg driver with direct DB connection.
category strip replaced with portrait card grid; 11 bugs fixed across 7 files
In-memory rate limiter pattern (Map + resetAt) established in admin/login — reuse verbatim for new rate-limited endpoints
next lint only lints src/ by default; run npx eslint . to catch root-level script issues

target: T1-1 cart architecture: CartContext -> local CartItem, checkout wired to real cart
lesson: File watcher reverts writes mid-session on Windows. Write via Python script file instead of inline -c to ensure content persists. Always verify with tsc immediately after writes.

orders/route.ts already existed; gaps were missing status=pending in WC body and payment title map missing UI slugs (card, applepay, tabby, tamara). checkout-client.tsx handlePlaceOrder was already fully wired.
bg-white text-white pattern produces invisible buttons; about page used bg-[#0c0c0c] violating no-pure-black rule — both patterns now replaced with brand-compliant primary/ghost variants
When fixing global CSS, update :root shadcn vars AND @theme inline block AND @layer base rules — all three layers independently maintain color state.
hover:border requires base border-transparent to prevent layout shift; aria-selected on Link requires explicit role=tab on parent and children
router.push in render body causes React rules-of-hooks violation; always wrap conditional navigation in useEffect with deps array

target: header, footer, collections, project-scale, project-gallery, projects-reel, promo-banner
lesson: shadow-elev-1/2/3 applied as inline boxShadow values since Tailwind arbitrary shadow breaks on framer-motion wrapped divs; rgba overlay values in elev shadows are intentional and not swept

target: globals.css — Arabic heading font + size bump
lesson: Systemic Arabic font fixes belong in globals.css, not per-page components

target: homepage, about, contact, careers, materials, inspirations, product-gallery, account, track-order
lesson: flex-row-reverse has no effect on grid containers — always use flex for rows that need RTL flip via flex-row-reverse. Add md:w-1/2 to flex children to preserve 50/50 split.

target: middleware.ts — bare-path 404 redirect + hreflang x-default audit
lesson: next-intl matcher must cover all paths, not just / and /(en|ar)/:path*. Bare paths need an explicit redirect-to-/en gate before intlMiddleware runs.

Wrong domain thedeskco.net was NOT in source files (sitemap.ts/robots.ts/layout.tsx are all correct with majestic-next.vercel.app fallbacks). Root cause was NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var set to thedeskco.net with a trailing 
 in .vercel/.env.production.local. Fixed that file + added explicit NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to .env.local for local dev clarity.
PCI-DSS: never render raw card inputs client-side before gateway integration. Always use text-red-600 + role=alert for error messages to ensure visual distinction from body text.
Non-functional UI (readOnly inputs, unhandled checkboxes) damages trust more than absent UI. Remove with TODO rather than ship decorative controls.

npm audit fix (non-force) resolved basic-ftp + next-intl; elliptic chain and next DoS vuln require --force with breaking changes — deferred. ISR set on all pages: 3600 homepage/blog, 900 shop, 1800 product detail, 86400 static pages.
React 19 custom element types must use declare module "react" { namespace JSX } not declare global { namespace JSX } — the global JSX namespace is ignored with react-jsx transform
